programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: (M) Katrina and Jack arrive in Petersburg, Virginia, to explore a bloody Civil War battlefield. They soon find that the spirits roaming the land want to make themselves known.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: (M) Jack is called to investigate the Enchanted Church, owned by Jack's former manny and his wife, who need his help to determine if what they're experiencing is holy or hellish.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: (M) Jack takes Sharon and Ozzy on a journey that is out of this world as he tries to convince them that cats can see ghosts and that Canada has its very own Loch Ness Monster.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
